verses.text: Egypt gam sungah Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah
“Tu kha pen note-a' dingin kum kipatna hi ding a, note-a' dingin kum khat sungah a kha masa hi ding hi
Israel mihon khempeuhte tungah gen in. Tu kha ni sawm ni-in innkuan khat-a' dingin tuuno ahih kei leh keelno khat, amau' innkuan phazah tawh kituakin amaute in ganno khat ciat go ding uh hi
Ganno khat a ne ding innkuanmi a tawmluat leh amau' innzom a vengte tawh a mi tawh kituakin a sa hawm ding uh hi. A mi tamna leh a nekzah uh tawh kizui-in ganno man pia ding uh hi
Na ganno uh a sitbaanglo hi ding a, kum khat a pha a pa hi ding hi. Tua pen tuu ahi a, keel ahi zongin, khat peuhpeuh hi thei ding hi
Tua gannote pen Israel mihonte khempeuh in a gawh ding hun nitak khuamui, tua kha ni sawmleli dong na kem ding uh hi
Tua ciangin amaute in a si kimkhat la-in a nekna uh inn kongkhak khuam nihte leh a bangtungzawl nuh ding uh hi
Amaute in tua zanin a sa hangkeu-in ne ding uh a, silngo sawhloh anlum leh a kha mehteh tawh amaute in ne ding uh hi
A sate mun khat peuhpeuh a sial ahi a, tui tawh huanin ahi zongin ne loin, a lu leh a khete leh a sungkuate tawh hang-in na ne ding uh hi
Zingsang dong a khing na omsak kei ding uh a, zingsang cianga a khing omlai peuhmah na haltum ding uh hi
Hih bang zia-in na ne ding uh hi: Na kawng uh gakin, na khedap uh na khe uhah bulhin, na ciangkhut uh na khut uhah na tawi ding uh a, na nawh nek ding uh hi. Tua pen Topa' Paisan Pawi ahi hi

“Bang hang hiam cih leh keimah in tua zanin Egypt gam ka nawk ding a, Egypt leitang tungah mihing hita leh ganhing hita leh tacil khempeuh ka vatlum ding a, Egypt pasian-te khempeuh tungah thu ka khen ding hi. Kei pen Topa ka hi hi

Note' omna inn tunga sisan pen note-a' dingin lim hi ding hi. Sisan ka muh ciangin note kong paisan ding a, Egypt leitang ka vatgawp ciangin note hong susia ding gimna note' tungah hong tunglo ding hi
“Hih pen note-a' dingin phawkna ni hi ding a, note in Topa' tungah pawi bawlna ni-in na nei ding uh hi. Na khang tawntungun note in biakna ngeina kip khatin na nei tawntung ding uh hi,” a ci hi.

Topa in, “Note in ni sagih sung silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi. A ni masa ni-in note in na inn panun silngo na hemkhia ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khatpeuh in a ni masa ni panin a ni sagih ni dong silngo sawh a nek leh, Israel mi-in tua mipa kiseh nawnlo ding hi
A ni masa ni leh a ni sagih ni-in a siangtho biak kikhopna khat na nei ding uh a, tua ni nih sung na bangmah na sem kei ding uh hi. Ahi zongin na milipun an huanin na ne thei ding uh hi

Note in silngo sawhloh anlum pawi na bawl ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh hih ni teekteekin Egypt leitang panin na mihonte uh ka paikhiatpih hi. Tua ahih ciangin note in na khan' tawntungun hih ni pen biakna ngeina kip khatin na nei tawntung ding uh hi
Kha masa, tua kha sawmleli nitakin note in silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh a, tua kha ni sawmnihlekhat nitak dong na ne ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh ni sagih sung na innsung uhah silngo kimulo ding hi. Mi khatpeuh, peemta hita leh gammi hita leh in silngo sawh a nek leh Israel mi-in tua mipa kiseh nawnlo ding hi
Silngo a kisawh peuhmah na ne kei ding uh hi. Na omna khempeuh uhah silngo sawhloh anlum na ne ding uh hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ciangin Moses in Israel upate khempeuh samin amaute kiangah, “Nomau-a' dingin na innkuan uh tawh a kituakin tuunote teel un la, Paisan Pawi bawlna ding tuuno go un
Puknah lomkhat la un la, kuang sunga om sisan sungah diahin, kuang sunga om sisan tawh bangtungzawl leh kongkhak khuam nihte nuh un. Zingsang matengin a inn kongkhak pua-ah kuamah paikhialo ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh Egypt mite a that dingin Topa in hong nawk ding hi. Bangtungzawl leh kongkhak khuam nih tunga sisan a muh ciangin Topa in kongkhak paisan ding a, a susia dingte pen note that dingin na innsung uhah tumsaklo ding hi
Note leh na tapate un hih pen biakna ngeina kipin na nei tawntung ding uh hi
Amah in hong ciamsa bangin Topa in note hong piak ding leitang na tun' uh ciangin hih ngeina na zui ding uh hi
Na tate un note kiangah, ‘Hih banga hihna pen bang a cih nopna ahi hiam?’ hong cih ciangin

note in, ‘ Topa' Paisanna hangin biakpiakna ahi hi. Amah in eite' innkuante hong khawi-in Egypt mite a thah lai-in Egypt gam sungah Israel innkuante paisan hi,’ na ci ding uh hi,” a ci hi. Mite in a lu uh kunin Pasian a bia uh hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Moses leh Aaron a thupiak bangin mite a gamta uh hi.
Ama kumpi tokhom tunga a tu Faro' tacil-a kipanin thongmial sunga a om a kiman mite' tacil leh ganhing tacil khempeuh, zankim laitakin Topa in vatgawp hi
Tua zanin Faro leh a nasemte khempeuh leh Egypt mite khempeuh tho uh a, Egypt gam sungah kahna lianpi a om hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh khat beek a sihlohna inn khat zong omlo hi
Faro in Moses leh Aaron zan sap a, “Ding un; keima mite' lak panin note leh Israel mite paikhia un la, na gensa bangun Topa va bia un
Na gensa bangun na tuuhonte uh leh na bawnghonte uh la un la, pai un. Kei zong thupha hong pia un,” a ci hi
Tua gam panin mite manlangin a sawlkhiatna ding uhah Egypt mite nawh tat mahmah uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in, “Eite khempeuh i si khin ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin mite in silngo sawh nailoh a annel lom uh la-in, annel mekna amau' kuangte puan tawh tunin a liangko uhah pua uh hi
Moses in amaute tunga a gen bangin Israel mite zong gamta uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in Egypt mite' tung panin ngun leh kham kizepnate leh puante ngen uh hi
Amau' ngette a piakna dingun Topa in Egypt mite' muhna-ah Israel mite maipha a pia hi. Tua bangin amaute in Egypt mite' na a sut uh hi.
Israel mite numei leh naupang kisim loin pasal tul za guk Rameses panin Sukkoth-ah khe-in pai uh hi
Minamdang tampi leh tuuhon leh bawnghon, ganhing tampi zong amau tawh pai uh hi

Egypt panin a ken' uh annel lom panin amaute in silngo sawhloh moh em uh hi. Tuate silngo a kisawh lohna pen Egypt gam panin amaute kinotkhia a, ze-ol tat theiloin amau' annek ding zong kiging manlo uh hi
Israel mite Egypt-ah kum za li leh kum sawmthum sung om uh hi
Kum za li leh kum sawmthum a cin' ni teekteekin Egypt leitang panin Topa' mihonpite paikhia uh hi

Egypt leitang panin amaute a paikhiatpihna dingin hih pen Topa' zan vilna ahi hi. Tua mah bangin Israel mite khempeuh in zong amau' khang tawntungin Topa-a' dingin hih zan mah zan vilna-in a nei uh hi.
Topa in Moses leh Aaron kiangah, “Hih Paisan Pawi pen biakna ngeina kip khat hi ding a, gamdangmi kuamah in nelo ding hi
Ahih hangin sum tawh a kilei sila peuhmah in a vun na at khit uh ciangin ne thei ding hi
Peemta hita leh a kicial nasem hita leh in ne theilo ding hi
Inn sungah kine ding a, inn pua-ah a sa na paikhiatpih kei ding uh hi. A guh na kuaitan kei ding uh hi
Israel mihon khempeuh in hih ding uh hi

Khualmi khat note kiangah hong peem a, Topa-a' dingin Paisan Pawi a bawl leh, ama mipih pasal khempeuh a vun ki-atsak un. Tua khit ciangin amah a nai-ah hong pai-in bawl thei ding a, amah pen gammi khat tawh kibang ding hi. Ahih hangin vun ki-atlo mi kuamah in nelo ding hi
Gammi leh note' lakah hong peem khualmi-a' dingin ngeina khat bek om ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua bangin Israel mite khempeuh gamta uh a, Topa in Moses leh Aaron a thupiak bangin amaute in hih uh hi
Tua ni teekteekin Topa in Israel mite a honpi-un Egypt gam panin a paikhiatpih hi.
